documents.title: Advanced Use
documents.summary: This document explains advanced tmux features including server socket management, pane monitoring for activity or silence, and handling working directories and window dimensions.

documents.title: Clipboard
documents.summary: This document explains how to synchronize the tmux internal clipboard with the system clipboard using OSC 52 escape sequences or external piping utilities.

documents.title: Contributing
documents.summary: This document outlines the tmux development process, including source code management, release cycles, and a roadmap of planned features and documentation improvements.

documents.title: Control Mode
documents.summary: This document explains tmux control mode, a text-only protocol that enables external applications to interface with and manage tmux sessions through standard commands and asynchronous notifications.

documents.title: FAQ
documents.summary: This document provides a collection of frequently asked questions and troubleshooting steps for the tmux terminal multiplexer, covering topics such as terminal settings, color support, and basic configuration.

documents.title: Formats
documents.summary: This document explains how to use tmux formats and directives to customize command output, status lines, and configuration logic. It details the syntax for variable expansion, string modifiers, comparisons, and substitutions within the tmux environment.

documents.title: Home
documents.summary: This document introduces tmux, a terminal multiplexer, and provides a centralized index of links for installation, documentation, support, and contribution.

documents.title: Recipes
documents.summary: This document provides a collection of configuration snippets and key binding recipes to customize tmux behavior for pane management, mouse interaction, and session navigation.

documents.title: Getting Started
documents.summary: This document provides an introductory overview of tmux, detailing its server-client architecture and the organizational hierarchy of sessions, windows, and panes.

documents.title: Installing
documents.summary: This document provides comprehensive instructions for installing tmux on various platforms using package managers, prebuilt binaries, or by compiling from source. It includes guidance on managing dependencies, build configurations, and troubleshooting common installation issues.

documents.title: Modifier Keys
documents.summary: This document explains how tmux interprets modifier keys and escape sequences from terminal emulators and provides guidance on configuring extended key support.
